"'''Milk Run'''" is a [[roleplaying game]] adventure featured in [[Polyhedron 83|''Polyhedron'' 83]]. It was written by [[Sterling Hershey]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. Like all supplements printed in ''[[Polyhedron]]'' prior to [[2002]], the adventure is considered non-[[canon]].

"Milk Run" was originally run as an ''[[RPGA|RPGA™ Network]]''-sanctioned tournament scenario by the RPGA at the Gen Con '91 convention, two years prior to its publication in Polyhedron.<ref name="SH_com">{{WebCite|url=http://www.sterlinghershey.com/freelance|text=Freelance|work=[https://www.sterlinghershey.com/ sterlinghersey.com]|archivedate=20090908083840}}</ref>

==Publisher's Summary==
''The hyperdrive is performing flawlessly. The nav computer works fine. Looks like a milk run. What could go wrong?''<ref name="RPGAversion">''"Milk Run"'' {{C|[[Gen Con Game Fair|Gen Con]] '91 RPGA™ Network summary}}</ref>
